metadata.title: ColorPicker
metadata.description: Allow users to select a color from a color palette.

properties.description: Allow user to select an alpha value.
The default value for the field.
An identifier for the field that is unique within the nearest containing form.
The currently selected color. Supported formats include: HSL

examples.name: Basic usage
examples.description: Demonstrates a simple color picker with a pre-selected red color, showing the basic implementation without alpha transparency.

examples.name: With alpha transparency
examples.description: Illustrates a color picker with alpha transparency enabled, allowing selection of colors with varying opacity levels.
examples.html_code:
<s-box padding="large" border="base" borderRadius="base">
  <s-color-picker
    value="#FF0000FF"
    alpha
    name="color-with-alpha"
  ></s-color-picker>
</s-box>
examples.erb_code:
<s-box padding="large" border="base" borderradius="base">
  <%= form.color_picker :color_with_alpha, value: "#FF0000FF", alpha: true %>
</s-box>
